# Screenshot

## Overview
Captures, annotates, and optimizes screenshots for documentation, bug reports, and presentations. Supports full-page, element, and region capture.

## Capabilities
- Full-page screenshot
- Viewport screenshot
- Element-specific capture
- Region/area selection
- Annotations (arrows, boxes, text, highlights)
- Auto-redact sensitive information

## Output Formats
- PNG for screenshots
- JPEG when file size matters
- PDF for multi-page documentation
